title: astragalus lutosus
intro: Astragalus lutosus, also known as the muddy milk vetch or alkaline milk vetch, is a perennial plant species native to the western United States and Canada. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing stress and anxiety, improving immune function, and protecting against cardiovascular disease. Astragalus lutosus can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as capsules, teas, and tinctures, and is often used in traditional Chinese medicine.
